description: Dark arts manipulating the boundary between life and death - communing with spirits, raising the fallen, and inflicting decay.
abilities: A debilitating curse placed through touch, lingering for weeks. The sillies, the clumsiness, or the blight. A careless casting may turn it contagious, or worse, rebound.
A telepathic channel opened to nearby spirits. A shared language is required, and the dead speak only if they wish to.
A grip on living flesh inflicts a necrotizing wound spreading in black-green tendrils. The corruption festers and resists all but the most potent restorative magic.
A chill in the bones when the dead are near. With effort, the sense reveals where creatures died and how. At its most intense, invisible spirits become visible.
A reasonably intact corpse inspected with careful hands. The remains yield the exact cause, time, and circumstances of death.
A curse placed on the heart through touch, set to detonate instantly or after a long silent delay. Against powerful enemies, it lies dormant like a tripwire.
A nearby corpse animated as a mindless thrall, controlled telepathically. It shambles and fights with modest capability. The animation dissolves the moment the caster departs.
A spirit merged with a living host through touch. A dark passenger riding within, conversing telepathically. With far greater power, the spirit fully inhabits the body.
A touch withers the body as though decades passed in an instant. The lifespan unchanged, but the weight and frailty of age settles in, reshaping priorities and desires.
